response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software engineering experience across multiple domains and languages, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platforms, no exposure to capital markets or fixed income systems, and no mention of SQL Server or Oracle — all mandatory requirements for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern technologies and CI/CD practices
Demonstrated ability to build high-performance systems and open-source tools
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and public talks
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Lacks any demonstrated capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle specificity
